public_verify_snapshot_unavailable: Content snapshot unavailable — this agreement was signed before snapshots were introduced.
public_verify_token_valid: ✓ Audit chain is intact and Ed25519 signatures are valid.
public_verify_token_footer: This page verifies the signed document against the tenant's Ed25519 public key. For an audit independent of this server, download the evidence pack and use the offline self-verify page (above).
public_viewer_tz_select_aria: Timezone for dates and times on this page
public_viewer_tz_detected_note: Detected from your browser. Pick another if this isn't your zone.
agent_portal_dashboard_subtitle: Your referrals across every team you partner with.
agent_portal_dashboard_tap_open: Tap a row below to open
agent_portal_dashboard_empty_body: Inspectors invite agents from their contacts list. Once you are linked, every inspection you refer lands here.
agent_portal_dashboard_welcome_banner: Welcome! Here's the inspection you were just added to.
agent_portal_inspectors_subtitle: Every team you partner with. Copy a booking link to share with clients.
agent_portal_inspectors_empty_body: Inspectors who invite you, or whose contact list already has your email, will appear here automatically.
agent_portal_inspectors_no_slug: This inspector has not published a booking slug yet.
agent_portal_invite_expired_headline_use: This invite has already been used
agent_portal_invite_expired_headline_no_: No invite token in this link
agent_portal_invite_expired_explainer_us: Looks like this invite has already been claimed. If that wasn't you, ask the inspector to resend.
agent_portal_invite_expired_explainer_no: The link is missing the invite token. Most likely the email got mangled in transit. Ask the inspector to copy the full link.
agent_portal_invite_expired_explainer_de: Invites expire after seven days. Ask the inspector for a fresh one -- the link below pre-fills the message.
agent_portal_invite_expired_mailto_subje: Could you re-send my partner agent invite?
agent_portal_invite_expired_mailto_body: My partner-agent invite to {tenant} expired before I could accept it. Could you re-send it?
agent_portal_invite_expired_signup_no_in: Or sign up directly without an invite
agent_portal_recommendations_meta: Every defect flagged in delivered inspection reports, grouped by category.
agent_portal_recommendations_empty: No {label} items in your referred reports.
agent_portal_settings_subtitle: Your public referral slug and the emails we send you.
agent_portal_settings_slug_desc: When you share a booking link with a client, this slug attributes the referral to you so the inspector knows where the client came from.
agent_portal_settings_slug_hint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens (3-32 chars).
agent_portal_settings_notifications_desc: High-signal alerts default ON. Toggle off any you don't want.
agent_portal_settings_notify_referral_su: When a client books an inspection using your referral link.
agent_portal_settings_notify_report_titl: A report is ready to read
agent_portal_settings_notify_report_subt: When the inspector publishes the report for one of your referrals.
agent_portal_settings_notify_paid_subtit: When your client pays the inspection invoice.
agent_portal_settings_slug_error_generic: Couldn't save your slug. Please try again.
agent_portal_settings_notify_error_gener: Couldn't save your notification preferences. Please try again.
agent_portal_settings_timezone_desc: Choose how referral dates and times appear to you.
agent_portal_settings_timezone_hint: When set, every referral date uses this zone. Otherwise each date shows in the inspecting company's timezone.
agent_portal_settings_timezone_saved: Saved. Your referral dates now use this timezone.
agent_portal_settings_timezone_error_gen: Couldn't save your timezone. Please try again.
oauth_authorize_intro: wants to access your OpenInspection data. Choose what it can read and change, then authorize.
oauth_authorize_scope_note: Ticking Write also grants Read. Access is limited to your role and to what {clientName} requested.
